author: Raahil Shah
name: 11L LeakyReLU² + Full GPTQ + QAT Alignment
blurb: LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation prevents dead neurons and doubles effective MLP capacity. Hessian-aware GPTQ quantization reduces int6 quant gap by 31%. QAT-export alignment via quantile(0.9995) clipping ensures STE matches the export quantizer. Built on 11L stack with EMA(0.997), Tight SWA, XSA4, VE128, Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale, SmearGate, BigramHash(2048), U-Net skips, int6+zstd-22.
